1.4.1.en: Security and bug fixes: removed X-Forwarded-For spoofing vector, added 1 MB request body limit, batch size limit (max 20), CSPRNG session IDs, proper session cleanup on stop, 404 on unknown DELETE session. Fixed missing energy kWh cost methods, flow tool pending-response memory leak, per-flow error isolation, null ledring guard, devices_get_capability null check, logic_get missing-args guard, alarms_update and flows_update field allowlisting. Removed insecure PAT-in-query-string routes.

1.4.0.en: 5 new flow cards: server-started trigger, agent-connected trigger, input-contains condition, input-is-empty condition, and send-error action. IP whitelist and rate limiting for security. Live session counter in settings. Fixed notification app ID bug. New system_get_mcp_sessions tool.

1.3.0.en: Rebranded to MCP AI Bridge. Added: When/Condition/Then flow cards to build custom AI tools from Homey flows (with real response callback), optional API key authentication, REST shortcuts via POST /tools/:name, and full OpenAPI 3.1 spec at GET /openapi.json.

1.0.0.en: Initial release — 83 tools to control Homey Pro from any AI agent via the Model Context Protocol. Devices, flows, advanced flows, zones, logic variables, alarms, energy, insights, notifications, apps, users and system management.

1.0.1.en: Fix README title to Claude MCP, improved compatibility

1.0.2.en: Added Homey Pro 2026 to supported models list

1.1.0.en: Fixed app ID (removed homey from ID), English readme.txt, Dutch readme.nl.txt, new recognizable icon

1.2.0.en: Updated app description to a clean tagline, redesigned icon as a clear AI spark on transparent background, and replaced store images with a clean professional design.

1.2.1.en: Removed empty contributing block, renamed internal /savepat route to /token, corrected supported models label in store images to Homey Pro 2016+.
